prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This report specifically discusses the experiences and viewpoints of social housing residents across England, indicating its applicability to the nation. It outlines the structure and findings from the Social Housing Resident Panel, which primarily consists of residents from England, thereby making it relevant to the policies and practices governing social housing in England.
